# VHP Sterilization Technology: Cycle Development and Validation for Pass-Through Chambers

## 适用受众
CTO

## 写作角度说明
VHP（汽化过氧化氢）灭菌是生物制药行业的黄金标准，但VHP传递窗的性能差异巨大。本角度帮助 CTO 建立评估VHP灭菌系统技术深度的框架。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
VHP sterilization performance is not just about concentration and contact time—cycle development methodology, humidity control precision, and material compatibility determine actual bioburden reduction efficacy.

## 参考素材
- VHP sterilization mechanism: H2O2 vapor penetration, hydroxyl radical formation, sporicidal efficacy
- Cycle parameters: concentration (200-1000ppm), relative humidity (30-70%), temperature (ambient to 40°C), contact time
- Biological indicator validation: Geobacillus stearothermophilus spores, D-value calculation
- Residual analysis: H2O2 decomposition products (H2O + O2), no toxic residues
- Material compatibility: silicone seals, window materials, surface finish requirements

## 关键词
VHP Sterilization, Bioburden Reduction, Sporicidal Efficacy, Biological Indicator, Humidity Control, H2O2 Decomposition
